content:
💡 lastsignal | Ruby
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a secure, self-hosted mechanism for users to ensure their important encrypted messages are delivered to loved ones or trusted contacts in the event of their incapacitation or death.
✨ Key Features: • Self-hosted dead man's switch • End-to-end encrypted (E2EE) messaging • Zero-knowledge architecture • Email-first check-in system
📖 Summary: LastSignal is a self-hosted, end-to-end encrypted dead man's switch that automatically delivers messages to trusted contacts if the user becomes unresponsive. It prioritizes security with a zero-knowledge architecture and modern cryptography, allowing users to configure check-in intervals and delivery delays.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
